name: Simple Cash Title Loans
description_short: Simple Cash Title Loans provides secured title loans on vehicles, motorcycles, boats, RVs, and trucks in Plainfield, Indiana, with APRs from 30%-35.99% and terms up to 60 months.
description_long:
Simple Cash Title Loans operates a physical storefront at 2907 E Main St in Plainfield, Indiana, specializing in title-secured lending products. The company focuses on providing quick cash access to borrowers who own vehicles or other titled assets and need emergency funds. They emphasize speed and accessibility, offering both in-person and online application processes through their website.

The company offers title loans secured by cars, motorcycles, boats, RVs, and trucks, as well as title loan refinancing options. Their stated value proposition centers on borrowers keeping their vehicle while using it as collateral. They claim to accept all credit types and advertise a quick inquiry process with friendly customer service. Monthly payments and flexible repayment terms are positioned as convenient alternatives to traditional lending.

Simple Cash Title Loans distinguishes itself through extended operating hours (7am-9pm weekdays, 9am-7pm weekends), a published Google rating of 4.0, and transparency regarding loan terms. They provide specific examples of loan costs and clearly disclose their APR range (30%-35.99%), finance charges, and repayment terms (90 days to 60 months) on their website. The company emphasizes that borrowers retain vehicle possession during the loan period.

However, this is a high-cost lending product. APRs of 30%-35.99% are substantially higher than traditional personal loans or credit union options. The loan example shown demonstrates how a $2,525 loan costs $1,049.80 in finance charges over 24 months. Title loans carry inherent risk: default can result in vehicle repossession. This product is best suited for true emergencies when no other options exist, not routine borrowing needs.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Accepts all credit types—no credit check rejection mentioned
Extended hours of operation (7am-9pm weekdays, 9am-7pm weekends) for accessibility
Borrowers retain vehicle use and possession during loan term
Transparent APR disclosure (30%-35.99%) and sample loan cost examples provided upfront
Multiple asset types accepted (cars, motorcycles, boats, RVs, trucks)
Flexible repayment terms ranging from 90 days to 60 months
Title loan refinancing option available for existing borrowers
cons: High APR range (30%-35.99%) results in substantial total costs—sample loan shows $1,049.80 finance charge on $2,525
Default risk: vehicle can be repossessed if payments are missed, as title is held as collateral
Requires acceptable property (vehicle title) as collateral, limiting accessibility for those without titled assets
Minimum loan amounts vary by state and are not disclosed, creating uncertainty about qualification
High cost makes this unsuitable for non-emergency borrowing or repeated use
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history facing genuine emergencies requiring immediate cash
Vehicle owners who need quick funds and cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Borrowers in urgent situations where speed outweighs the cost of borrowing
diagnosis: Simple Cash Title Loans is appropriate only for borrowers facing genuine financial emergencies who own titled vehicles and cannot access traditional credit. The primary caveat is the high cost: 30%-35.99% APRs mean this is expensive money, and default results in vehicle loss—making it a high-risk product suitable only when truly necessary.
services: In-person loan processing at Plainfield location
Loan approval based on credit criteria and collateral evaluation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
